workflow.name: LLM Suggestion Review Workflow
workflow.description: FE-15 v1 them review-first workflow cho LLM-suggested scenarios. Suggestions duoc tao tu FE-06 LLM pipeline, persist thanh pending rows trong TestGeneration, sau do user preview va review tung cai truoc khi tao `TestCase` thuc te.

architectureOverview.summary: Khac voi FE-06 direct-generation, FE-15 tao durable pending suggestions truoc, roi moi cho phep human approve/reject/modify. `TestGeneration` la primary module, `LlmAssistant` chi tiep tuc lo raw cache + audit cho luong LLM call.
architectureOverview.futureExtension: FE-16 co the them feedback table tham chieu `LlmSuggestion`; FE-17 co the them bulk review commands tren cung entity nay.

usage: Reuse raw cache and audit behavior indirectly through existing `ILlmScenarioSuggester` implementation.
Khong duoc luu durable review state vao `llmassistant` schema.

steps.action: POST /api/test-suites/{suiteId:guid}/llm-suggestions/generate
Resolve CurrentUserId, bind request, dispatch GenerateLlmSuggestionPreviewCommand.
Validate suite ownership, suite status, approved API order, va LLM usage limit.
Reuse FE-06 pipeline de load raw suggestions; cache hit thi dung cached payload, cache miss thi goi live LLM.
Mark existing pending suggestions for suite as `Superseded`, persist new `LlmSuggestion` rows with `ReviewStatus=Pending`, `CacheKey`, ordered display index, va raw payload snapshot.
Return 201 voi `GenerateLlmSuggestionPreviewResultModel`.
GET /api/test-suites/{suiteId:guid}/llm-suggestions?reviewStatus=&testType=&endpointId=
Validate suite ownership, query durable `LlmSuggestion` rows by suite + filters, order by active set first then display index.
Nhan 200 voi preview cards cho UI review.
GET /api/test-suites/{suiteId:guid}/llm-suggestions/{suggestionId}
Validate suite ownership, load exact suggestion row, deserialize payloads, map full detail model.
Nhan 200 voi request/expectation/variables de preview.
PUT /api/test-suites/{suiteId:guid}/llm-suggestions/{suggestionId}/review { action: Approve, rowVersion }
Load suite + suggestion, validate owner, validate rowVersion, validate suggestion status co the review.
Map raw suggestion payload thanh in-memory `TestCase`, `TestCaseRequest`, `TestCaseExpectation`, `TestCaseVariable` su dung same builder logic da dung trong FE-06.
Execute transaction: persist test case graph + change log + suite version, update suggestion `ReviewStatus=Approved`, `ReviewedById`, `ReviewedAt`, `AppliedTestCaseId`.
Return 200 voi updated `LlmSuggestionModel`.
PUT /api/test-suites/{suiteId:guid}/llm-suggestions/{suggestionId}/review { action: Modify, rowVersion, modifiedContent }
Validate modified payload day du va hop le cho request/expectation/test-type fields.
Materialize tu modified payload thay vi raw original payload.
Execute same transaction pattern nhu Approve, nhung set `ReviewStatus=ModifiedAndApproved` va luu `ModifiedContent` jsonb.
PUT /api/test-suites/{suiteId:guid}/llm-suggestions/{suggestionId}/review { action: Reject, rowVersion, reviewNotes }
Validate suggestion status con review duoc va reviewNotes co noi dung hop ly.
Update suggestion `ReviewStatus=Rejected`, `ReviewedById`, `ReviewedAt`, `ReviewNotes`; khong tao `TestCase` moi.
Return 200 voi updated suggestion row.

entities: Same write set as approve + `ModifiedContent` persisted

nonTransactionalWrites: Reject suggestion can use normal save path if only one aggregate row changes.
Generate preview can use default save path unless you choose to supersede old rows + insert new rows in one explicit transaction.

qualityGates.name: Do Not Reuse Raw Cache As Review Storage
qualityGates.rule: Durable review state phai nam trong `testgen` schema; `llmassistant.LlmSuggestionCaches` chi la raw cache.

qualityGates.name: Reuse FE-06 Mapping Logic
qualityGates.rule: Khong duplicate manually logic map request/expectation/variables neu co the tach thanh shared service.

qualityGates.name: No FE-06 Regression
qualityGates.rule: Refactor cho FE-15 khong duoc thay doi output semantics cua endpoint `generate-boundary-negative`.

qualityGates.name: Migration Required
qualityGates.rule: Vi them entity durable moi trong TestGeneration, phai co migration moi va `--verify-migrations` phai xanh.

examples: modifiedContent bat buoc khi action = Modify.
Khong the review suggestion da o trang thai cuoi cung.
Khong tim thay suggestion voi ma '{suggestionId}'.
CONCURRENCY_CONFLICT: RowVersion cua suggestion khong khop.
ORDER_CONFIRMATION_REQUIRED: Chua co approved API order.
SUGGESTION_ALREADY_APPLIED: Suggestion da duoc materialize truoc do.

implementationChecklist.name: Shared Materializer
tasks: Tach logic map suggestion sang service/factory dung chung.
Cap nhat FE-06 generator de reuse service nay.

implementationChecklist.name: API Surface
tasks: Them controller, commands, queries, request/response models.

implementationChecklist.name: Review Lifecycle
tasks: Them suite version + change log writes cho approve/modify.
